title: New core/src/guild.rs: GuildState+ChannelState types and CID/signing functions
description:
What: Create new file core/src/guild.rs with all guild/channel core types and utility functions. Export from core/src/lib.rs.

Algorithm:
1. Create /home/mark/PROJECT/Agora/core/src/guild.rs with:

   a) Structs:
      - DataIntegrityProof { type_: String, cryptosuite: String, verification_method: String, created: String, signature_value: String }  // serde rename type_ -> "type" etc.
      - ChannelEntry { path: String, name: String, channel_type: String, mode: String, mls_group_id: Option<String>, channel_secret_b64: Option<String>, speaker_cap: Option<u32>, idle_evict_days: Option<u32> }
      - GuildState { context: String, type_: String, schema_version: String, id: String, name: String, description: Option<String>, owner: String, admin_set: Vec<String>, channels: Vec<ChannelEntry>, mls_group_id: String, seq: u64, created_at: String, prev_state_cid: Option<String>, proof: Option<DataIntegrityProof> }
      - ChannelState { context: String, type_: String, schema_version: String, id: String, guild_cid: String, path: String, name: String, channel_type: String, mode: String, mls_group_id: Option<String>, channel_secret_b64: Option<String>, seq: u64, created_at: String, prev_state_cid: Option<String>, proof: Option<DataIntegrityProof> }
      - All fields that contain "type" in JSON must use serde rename (Rust field type_ -> JSON "type"; field context -> "@context"; field type_ -> "@type")
      - All structs: #[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]

   b) Constant: const AGORA_CONTEXT: &str = "https://agora.protocol/ns/v1";

   c) Function make_guild_cid(state_without_proof: &GuildState) -> Result<String>:
      1. Clone state, set proof = None
      2. Serialize to JSON bytes: serde_json::to_vec(&state_no_proof)?  (BTreeMap default = deterministic)
      3. Compute SHA-256: sha2::Sha256::digest(&json_bytes)
      4. Build multihash: multihash::Multihash::wrap(0x12, &hash_bytes)?  // 0x12 = sha2-256
      5. Build CID: cid::Cid::new_v1(0x0200, multihash)  // 0x0200 = json codec (or use 0x0129 = dag-json)
         Actually use codec 0x0129 (dag-json) for JSON documents
      6. Return cid.to_string()

   d) Function sign_guild_state(state: &mut GuildState, signer_did: &str, signing_key: &SigningKey) -> Result<String> (returns CID):
      1. state.proof = None
      2. Canonical bytes = serde_json::to_vec(state)?
      3. hash = sha2::Sha256::digest(&canonical_bytes)
      4. sig = signing_key.sign(&hash)
      5. proof = DataIntegrityProof { type_: "DataIntegrityProof", cryptosuite: "agora-eddsa-v1", verification_method: signer_did.to_string(), created: chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(), signature_value: base64::engine::general_purpose::URL_SAFE_NO_PAD.encode(sig.to_bytes()) }
      6. state.proof = Some(proof)
      7. cid = make_guild_cid_from_bytes(&canonical_bytes)  // use the pre-proof bytes for CID
      8. Return cid

   e) Function sign_channel_state(state: &mut ChannelState, signer_did: &str, signing_key: &SigningKey) -> Result<String>: same pattern as sign_guild_state

   f) Function verify_guild_state(state: &GuildState, verifying_key: &VerifyingKey) -> Result<()>:
      1. Extract proof (return Err if None)
      2. Clone state, set proof = None
      3. Canonical bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&state_no_proof)?
      4. hash = sha2::Sha256::digest(&canonical_bytes)
      5. Decode sig from proof.signature_value (base64url)
      6. verifying_key.verify(&hash, &sig)?
      7. Return Ok(())

   g) Function make_broadcast_token(channel_secret_b64: &str) -> Result<String>:
      1. Decode base64 from channel_secret_b64
      2. Verify length == 32 bytes
      3. Return base64url-encoded token (just re-encode as URL_SAFE_NO_PAD — the token IS the secret encoded differently)

2. In core/src/lib.rs, add: pub mod guild; and pub use guild::{GuildState, ChannelState, DataIntegrityProof, ChannelEntry, make_guild_cid, sign_guild_state, sign_channel_state, verify_guild_state, make_broadcast_token};

3. Run cargo check -p agora-core and cargo test -p agora-core. Fix any issues.

Add tests in guild.rs:
- guild_state_roundtrip: serialize/deserialize GuildState, verify fields preserved
- sign_and_verify_guild: create GuildState, sign it, verify signature passes, verify wrong-key fails
- cid_is_deterministic: same GuildState produces same CID twice

Defensive rules:
- sign_* functions: state.proof = None before computing canonical bytes
- verify_* functions: must extract proof first then serialize without proof
- All serde field names must exactly match the JSON-LD spec
- No unwrap() without explanatory comment

Report: pass/fail for cargo check and cargo test -p agora-core. List all struct field names with their JSON names.
acceptance_criteria: cargo check -p agora-core exits 0; cargo test -p agora-core passes all new tests; guild.rs exports all required types/functions from lib.rs
